## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` is clean (0 errors, 0 warnings)
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] Verified in **Firefox** and **Chrome** on a real PR
- [ ] E2E updated/added and passing (`bun run test:e2e:firefox` and `test:e2e:chrome`) for behavior changes
- [ ] Intent (`.idd`) and feature (`.bdd`) specs updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if usage or behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or machine-specific absolute paths committed
